name: Your Europe, Your Say! (YEYS) 2026
description: Annual flagship youth event by the European Economic and Social Committee. Secondary school students debate EU policy topics. Travel and accommodation fully funded by the EESC.

name: European Forum of Young Leaders 2026
description: Part of European Youth Week. Forum for 130 young leaders to develop competences, network, and shape EU youth policy.

name: Seize the Summer with EURES 2026
description: Online recruitment fair for seasonal summer jobs across 11 EU countries. Jobs in tourism, hospitality, catering, entertainment, and childcare. Includes online interviews via Jitsi.

name: MIT European Career Fair — Resume & Career Workshops
description: Free resume workshops, headshots, and career development sessions held alongside the 30th edition of the MIT European Career Fair.

name: MIT European Career Fair
description: 30th edition of Europe's largest overseas career fair. Multinational corporations, non-profits, and research organizations recruit candidates for European roles.

name: High North Young Entrepreneur
description: Pitch competition for young entrepreneurs in Northern Norway, held during the High North Dialogue conference. Prize pool of 70,000 NOK. Application deadline: 15 March 2026.

name: Oslo Tech Show 2026
description: Norway's largest technology conference and exhibition. Six expos covering AI, Data Centre, Cloud, Cybersecurity, DevOps, and Mobile. 150+ exhibitors. Free exhibition access. Includes AI hackathon.

name: EU-Startups Summit
description: Up to 2,500 founders, startup enthusiasts, corporates, angel investors, VCs, and media from across Europe. Includes pitch competition.

name: SpinLab Bootcamp + Pitch Event
description: One-week bootcamp for underrepresented founders culminating in a pitch event. Teams are selected after the bootcamp to present business ideas.

name: University of Oslo Career Fair 2026
description: Annual career fair at Norway's oldest and largest university. Over 50 employers from various sectors. Students meet employers on stand, explore career paths, and network.

name: ITxBergen Career Day 2026
description: Career fair for IT students in the Bergen area at Grieghallen. Organised by ITxBergen in collaboration with IT-related student groups at UiB, HVL, and Kristiania.

name: Nordic Tech Week
description: City-wide festival with free access to its flagship conference and 300+ events across Stockholm. Covers AI, sustainability, deeptech, and more. Open to students and early-career talent.

name: Oslo Innovation Week
description: Week-long innovation festival with meetups, networking, and events across Oslo's startup and tech ecosystem.

name: Kunskap & Framtid 2026
description: The largest job and education fair in western Sweden. High school students, college students, and young adults meet universities, vocational schools, and employers.

name: Erasmus+ Youth Exchanges
description: EU-funded cross-border youth exchanges featuring workshops, debates, role-plays, and outdoor activities. Free to participants — funded by Erasmus+ programme. Apply via registered organisations.
